title: Salesforce ingestion connector supports history tracking (SCD type 2)
body: By default, history tracking is off (SCD type 1) for managed connectors in Lakeflow Connect. This setting overwrites outdated records as they're updated and deleted in the source. You can now enable history tracking (SCD type 2) to maintain a history of those changes. See  [Examples: Salesforce](/aws/en/ingestion/lakeflow-connect/scd#sfdc-api).
